{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2003
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2003
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = 2 February – 4 June
|num_teams       = 65
|champions       = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]
|runner-up       = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]
|matches         = 118
|goals           = 347
|top goal scorer = [[Nonato (footballer, born 1979)|Nonato]] (9)
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2002 Copa do Brasil|2002]]
|nextseason      = [[2004 Copa do Brasil|2004]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 2003''' was the 15th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. 

The competition started on 2 February and concluded on 4 June 2003 with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Mineirão|Mineirão Stadium]] in [[Belo Horizonte]], in which [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] lifted the trophy for the fourth time with a 3-1 victory over [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]].

[[Nonato (footballer, born 1979)|Nonato]], of [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]], with nine goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The competition was contested by 65 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used, with the exception of the preliminary match, which was played in a single match, and in the first two rounds if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round.

==Participating teams==
{{col-begin}}
{{col-2}}
*[[Alegrense Futebol Clube|Alegrense (ES)]]
*[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
*[[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano (RJ)]]
*[[Associação Atlética Anapolina|Anapolina (GO)]]
*[[Atlético Cajazeirense de Desportos|Atlético Cajazeirense (PB)]]
*[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]
*[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]
*[[Bangu Atlético Clube|Bangu (RJ)]]
*[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]
*[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]
*[[Associação Atlética Caldense|Caldense (MG)]]
*[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]
*[[Centro Esportivo Nova Esperança|CENE (MS)]]
*[[Clube de Futebol da Amazônia|CFA (RO)]]
*[[Centro de Futebol Zico de Brasília Sociedade Esportiva|CFZ (DF)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Comercial (MS)|Comercial (MS)]]
*[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança (SE)]]
*[[Sport Club Corinthians Alagoano|Corinthians (AL)]]
*[[Atlético Clube Coríntians|Coríntians (RN)]]
*[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]
*[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]
*[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB (AL)]]
*[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]
*[[Clube Esportivo Dom Bosco|Dom Bosco (MT)]]
*[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense (SC)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo (PI)]]
*[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]
*[[Fluminense de Feira Futebol Clube|Fluminense (BA)]]
*[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]
*[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]
*[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama (DF)]]
*[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]
{{col-2}}
*[[Esporte Clube Guarani|Guarani/VA (RS)]]
*[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude (RS)]]
*[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
*[[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga (MG)]]
*[[Iraty Sport Club|Iraty (PR)]]
*[[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana (SE)]]
*[[Ituano Futebol Clube|Ituano (SP)]]
*[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club (MA)]]
*[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]
*[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]
*[[Operário Futebol Clube (Várzea Grande)|Operário (MT)]]
*[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]
*[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Pelotas|Pelotas (RS)]]
*[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]
*[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]
*[[Rio Branco Atlético Clube|Rio Branco (ES)]]
*[[River Atlético Clube|River (PI)]]
*[[Atlético Roraima Clube|Roraima (RR)]]
*[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]
*[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]
*[[Associação Desportiva São Caetano|São Caetano (SP)]]
*[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]
*[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (AM)|São Raimundo (AM)]]
*[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]
*[[Tocantinópolis Esporte Clube|Tocantinópolis (TO)]]
*[[Tuna Luso Brasileira|Tuna Luso (PA)]]
*[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]
*[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]
*[[Ypiranga Clube|Ypiranga (AP)]]
{{col-end}}

==Competition stages==
{{2TeamBracket
| RD1=Preliminary match
| RD1-team1=Paraná (PR)
| RD1-score1=0
| RD1-team2='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD1-score2=1
}}
{{64TeamBracket|legs=2
| seeds = no
| compact = yes
| RD1-team01 = CFZ (DF) | RD1-team02 = '''Fortaleza (CE)'''
| RD1-score01-1 = 0 | RD1-score02-1 = 0
| RD1-score01-2 = 0 | RD1-score02-2 = 1
| RD1-team03 = Americano (RJ) | RD1-team04 = '''Figueirense (SC)'''
| RD1-score03-1 = 2 | RD1-score04-1 = 1
| RD1-score03-2 = 2 | RD1-score04-2 = 4
| RD1-team05 = São Raimundo (AM) | RD1-team06 = '''São Paulo (SP)'''
| RD1-score05-1 = 2 | RD1-score06-1 = 0
| RD1-score05-2 = 0 | RD1-score06-2 = 6
| RD1-team07 = Bangu (RJ) | RD1-team08 = '''Gama (DF)'''
| RD1-score07-1 = 2 | RD1-score08-1 = 1
| RD1-score07-2 = 0 | RD1-score08-2 = 2
| RD1-team09 = '''Ituano (SP)''' | RD1-team10 = Coritiba (PR)
| RD1-score09-1 = 2 | RD1-score10-1 = 0
| RD1-score09-2 = 0 | RD1-score10-2 = 1
| RD1-team11 = Ipatinga (MG) | RD1-team12 = '''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD1-score11-1 = 2 | RD1-score12-1 = 1
| RD1-score11-2 = 0 | RD1-score12-2 = 1
| RD1-team13 = CENE (MS) | RD1-team14 = '''Botafogo (RJ)'''
| RD1-score13-1 = 0 | RD1-score14-1 = 2
| RD1-team15 = Sampaio Corrêa (MA) | RD1-team16 = '''São Caetano (SP)'''
| RD1-score15-1 = 1 | RD1-score16-1 = 4
| RD1-team17 = Pelotas (RS) | RD1-team18 = '''Guarani (SP)'''
| RD1-score17-1 = 1 | RD1-score18-1 = 2
| RD1-score17-2 = 1 | RD1-score18-2 = 1
| RD1-team19 = Iraty (PR) | RD1-team20 = '''Vila Nova (GO)'''
| RD1-score19-1 = 0 | RD1-score20-1 = 3
| RD1-team21 = Rio Branco (ES) | RD1-team22 = '''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD1-score21-1 = 2 | RD1-score22-1 = 4
| RD1-team23 = '''Coríntians (RN)''' | RD1-team24 = Santa Cruz (PE)
| RD1-score23-1 = 2 | RD1-score24-1 = 0
| RD1-score23-2 = 1 | RD1-score24-2 = 2
| RD1-team25 = River (PI) | RD1-team26 = '''Moto Club (MA)'''
| RD1-score25-1 = 1 | RD1-score26-1 = 0
| RD1-score25-2 = 2 | RD1-score26-2 = 4
| RD1-team27 = '''Vasco (RJ)''' | RD1-team28 = Itabaiana (SE)
| RD1-score27-1 = 1 | RD1-score28-1 = 0
| RD1-score27-2 = 4 | RD1-score28-2 = 0
| RD1-team29 = Atlético (PB) | RD1-team30 = '''Bahia (BA)'''
| RD1-score29-1 = 1 | RD1-score30-1 = 1
| RD1-score29-2 = 1 | RD1-score30-2 = 4
| RD1-team31 = '''CF Amazônia (RO)''' | RD1-team32 = Rio Branco (AC)
| RD1-score31-1 = 3 | RD1-score32-1 = 0
| RD1-score31-2 = 0 | RD1-score32-2 = 2
| RD1-team33 = Alegrense (ES) | RD1-team34 = '''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD1-score33-1 = 2 | RD1-score34-1 = 3
| RD1-score33-2 = 1 | RD1-score34-2 = 5
| RD1-team35 = '''Palmeiras (SP)''' | RD1-team36 = Operário (MT)
| RD1-score35-1 = 1 | RD1-score36-1 = 0
| RD1-score35-2 = 5 | RD1-score36-2 = 1
| RD1-team37 = Tocantinópolis (TO) | RD1-team38 = '''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD1-score37-1 = 1 | RD1-score38-1 = 2
| RD1-score37-2 = 1 | RD1-score38-2 = 0
| RD1-team39 = '''Atlético (RR)''' | RD1-team40 = Nacional (AM)
| RD1-score39-1 = 4 | RD1-score40-1 = 1
| RD1-score39-2 = 0 | RD1-score40-2 = 2
| RD1-team41 = Confiança (SE) | RD1-team42 = '''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD1-score41-1 = 1 | RD1-score42-1 = 0
| RD1-score41-2 = 0 | RD1-score42-2 = 2
| RD1-team43 = '''Flamengo (RJ)''' | RD1-team44 = Botafogo (PB)
| RD1-score43-1 = 4 | RD1-score44-1 = 1
| RD1-team45 = Ypiranga (AP) | RD1-team46 = '''Remo (PA)'''
| RD1-score45-1 = 1 | RD1-score46-1 = 3
| RD1-team47 = '''Internacional (RS)''' | RD1-team48 = Comercial (MS)
| RD1-score47-1 = 2 | RD1-score48-1 = 0
| RD1-team49 = Corinthians (AL) | RD1-team50 = '''Flamengo (PI)'''
| RD1-score49-1 = 0 | RD1-score50-1 = 1
| RD1-score49-2 = 0 | RD1-score50-2 = 1
| RD1-team51 = '''Fluminense (RJ)''' | RD1-team52 = Fluminense (BA)
| RD1-score51-1 = 1 | RD1-score52-1 = 1
| RD1-score51-2 = 4 | RD1-score52-2 = 0
| RD1-team53 = Dom Bosco (MT) | RD1-team54 = '''Sport (PE)'''
| RD1-score53-1 = 0 | RD1-score54-1 = 5
| RD1-team55 = '''Atlético (PR)''' | RD1-team56 = Tuna Luso (PA)
| RD1-score55-1 = 2 | RD1-score56-1 = 2
| RD1-score55-2 = 1 | RD1-score56-2 = 0
| RD1-team57 = Juventude (RS) | RD1-team58 = '''Caldense (MG)'''<ref>Penalties: Juventude (RS) 3-5 Caldense (MG).</ref>
| RD1-score57-1 = 2 | RD1-score58-1 = 1
| RD1-score57-2 = 1 | RD1-score58-2 = 2
| RD1-team59 = '''Atlético (MG)''' | RD1-team60 = CRB (AL)
| RD1-score59-1 = 1 | RD1-score60-1 = 0
| RD1-score59-2 = 4 | RD1-score60-2 = 0
| RD1-team61 = Anapolina (GO) | RD1-team62 = '''Náutico (PE)'''
| RD1-score61-1 = 1 | RD1-score62-1 = 2
| RD1-score61-2 = 1 | RD1-score62-2 = 3
| RD1-team63 = '''América (RN)''' | RD1-team64 = Guarani (RS)
| RD1-score63-1 = 1 | RD1-score64-1 = 2
| RD1-score63-2 = 1 | RD1-score64-2 = 0
| RD2-team01 = Fortaleza (CE) | RD2-team02 = '''Figueirense (SC)'''
| RD2-score01-1 = 3 | RD2-score02-1 = 1
| RD2-score01-2 = 0 | RD2-score02-2 = 2
| RD2-team03 = '''São Paulo (SP)''' | RD2-team04 = Gama (DF)
| RD2-score03-1 = 2 | RD2-score04-1 = 2
| RD2-score03-2 = 5 | RD2-score04-2 = 1
| RD2-team05 = Ituano (SP) | RD2-team06 = '''Goiás (GO)'''<ref>Penalties: Goiás (GO) 4-2 Ituano (SP).</ref>
| RD2-score05-1 = 1 | RD2-score06-1 = 1
| RD2-score05-2 = 1 | RD2-score06-2 = 1
| RD2-team07 = '''Botafogo (RJ)''' | RD2-team08 = São Caetano (SP)
| RD2-score07-1 = 2 | RD2-score08-1 = 1
| RD2-score07-2 = 2 | RD2-score08-2 = 0
| RD2-team09 = Guarani (SP) | RD2-team10 = '''Vila Nova (GO)''' <ref>Guarani (SP) fielded an ineligible player in the first leg so it lost the points and the classification was awarded to Villa Nova (GO).</ref>
| RD2-score09-1 = 3 | RD2-score10-1 = 1
| RD2-score09-2 = 0 | RD2-score10-2 = 1
| RD2-team11 = Coríntians (RN) | RD2-team12 = '''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD2-score11-1 = 2 | RD2-score12-1 = 2
| RD2-score11-2 = 0 | RD2-score12-2 = 7
| RD2-team13 = Moto Club (MA) | RD2-team14 = '''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD2-score13-1 = 0 | RD2-score14-1 = 2
| RD2-team15 = CF Amazônia (RO) | RD2-team16 = '''Bahia (BA)'''
| RD2-score15-1 = 3 | RD2-score16-1 = 3
| RD2-score15-2 = 1 | RD2-score16-2 = 4
| RD2-team17 = Criciúma (SC) | RD2-team18 = '''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD2-score17-1 = 1 | RD2-score18-1 = 1
| RD2-score17-2 = 1 | RD2-score18-2 = 2
| RD2-team19 = '''Vitória (BA)''' | RD2-team20 = Atlético (RR)
| RD2-score19-1 = 2 | RD2-score20-1 = 1
| RD2-score19-2 = 5 | RD2-score20-2 = 1
| RD2-team21 = Ceará (CE) | RD2-team22 = '''Flamengo (RJ)'''<ref>Penalties: Flamengo (RJ) 4-3 Ceará (CE).</ref>
| RD2-score21-1 = 1 | RD2-score22-1 = 0
| RD2-score21-2 = 0 | RD2-score22-2 = 1
| RD2-team23 = '''Remo (PA)''' | RD2-team24 = Internacional (RS)
| RD2-score23-1 = 1 | RD2-score24-1 = 0
| RD2-score23-2 = 1 | RD2-score24-2 = 2
| RD2-team25 = Flamengo (PI) | RD2-team26 = '''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD2-score25-1 = 1 | RD2-score26-1 = 2
| RD2-score25-2 = 0 | RD2-score26-2 = 2
| RD2-team27 = '''Sport (PE)''' | RD2-team28 = Atlético (PR)
| RD2-score27-1 = 3 | RD2-score28-1 = 2
| RD2-score27-2 = 1 | RD2-score28-2 = 0
| RD2-team29 = Caldense (MG) | RD2-team30 = '''Atlético (MG)'''
| RD2-score29-1 = 0 | RD2-score30-1 = 1
| RD2-score29-2 = 0 | RD2-score30-2 = 4
| RD2-team31 = '''Náutico (PE)''' | RD2-team32 = América (RN)
| RD2-score31-1 = 1 | RD2-score32-1 = 2
| RD2-score31-2 = 3 | RD2-score32-2 = 1
| RD3-team01 = Figueirense (SC) | RD3-team02 = '''São Paulo (SP)'''
| RD3-score01-1 = 0 | RD3-score02-1 = 2
| RD3-score01-2 = 0 | RD3-score02-2 = 1
| RD3-team03 = '''Goiás (GO)''' | RD3-team04 = Botafogo (RJ)
| RD3-score03-1 = 2 | RD3-score04-1 = 1
| RD3-score03-2 = 3 | RD3-score04-2 = 2
| RD3-team05 = Vila Nova (GO) | RD3-team06 = '''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD3-score05-1 = 0 | RD3-score06-1 = 2
| RD3-score05-2 = 1 | RD3-score06-2 = 2
| RD3-team07 = Bahia (BA) | RD3-team08 = '''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD3-score07-1 = 2 | RD3-score08-1 = 1
| RD3-score07-2 = 0 | RD3-score08-2 = 1
| RD3-team09 = Palmeiras (SP) | RD3-team10 = '''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD3-score09-1 = 2 | RD3-score10-1 = 7
| RD3-score09-2 = 3 | RD3-score10-2 = 1
| RD3-team11 = '''Flamengo (RJ)''' | RD3-team12 = Remo (PA)
| RD3-score11-1 = 4 | RD3-score12-1 = 0
| RD3-score11-2 = 3 | RD3-score12-2 = 2
| RD3-team13 = Fluminense (RJ) | RD3-team14 = '''Sport (PE)'''
| RD3-score13-1 = 0 | RD3-score14-1 = 1
| RD3-score13-2 = 1 | RD3-score14-2 = 2
| RD3-team15 = '''Atlético (MG)''' | RD3-team16 = Náutico (PE)
| RD3-score15-1 = 2 | RD3-score16-1 = 1
| RD3-score15-2 = 3 | RD3-score16-2 = 1
| RD4-team01 = São Paulo (SP) | RD4-team02 = '''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD4-score01-1 = 0 | RD4-score02-1 = 0
| RD4-score01-2 = 1 | RD4-score02-2 = 1
| RD4-team03 = '''Cruzeiro (MG)''' | RD4-team04 = Vasco (RJ)
| RD4-score03-1 = 2 | RD4-score04-1 = 1
| RD4-score03-2 = 1 | RD4-score04-2 = 1
| RD4-team05 = Vitória (BA) | RD4-team06 = '''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD4-score05-1 = 1 | RD4-score06-1 = 2
| RD4-score05-2 = 1 | RD4-score06-2 = 3
| RD4-team07 = '''Sport (PE)''' | RD4-team08 = Atlético (MG)
| RD4-score07-1 = 4 | RD4-score08-1 = 0
| RD4-score07-2 = 1 | RD4-score08-2 = 3
| RD5-team01 = Goiás (GO) | RD5-team02 = '''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD5-score01-1 = 2 | RD5-score02-1 = 3
| RD5-score01-2 = 1 | RD5-score02-2 = 2
| RD5-team03 = '''Flamengo (RJ)''' | RD5-team04 = Sport (PE)
| RD5-score03-1 = 1 | RD5-score04-1 = 0
| RD5-score03-2 = 0 | RD5-score04-2 = 0
| RD6-team01 = '''Cruzeiro (MG)''' | RD6-team02 = Flamengo (RJ)
| RD6-score01-1 = 1 | RD6-score02-1 = 1
| RD6-score01-2 = 3 | RD6-score02-2 = 1
}}

{{winners||Copa do Brasil<br />2003 winners|[[Image:Bandeira de Minas Gerais.svg|100px|border|Minas Gerais]]<br>[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]|Fourth}}

===Notes===
<references/>

==References==
* [https://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr2003.htm Copa do Brasil 2003 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2003}}
[[Category:2003 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2003]]
[[Category:2003 in Brazilian football]]
